text: Most founders need to raise capital. With my first startup, I raised $120 million
and realized that the process to raise venture capital is massively broken.
Fundraising feels a lot like speed-dealing the wrong people. You know
within minutes they were never going to invest. Maybe you're too early, too late,
wrong stage, or just outside their focus. As founders, we waste so much time
chasing down the wrong investors. What if you never had to guess again? Meet Richard AI,
your fundraising co-pilot that is trained on data from the entire industry. Once you sign up,
Richard AI instantly understands your company and can offer custom guidance.
Richard, is CRV a good fit for my company? Richard, how can I improve my pitch deck?
Richard, who do I know that can reduce me to CRV? We've spent two years fine-tuning
metal with founders raising venture capital. Now we're opening it up for broader access.
If you're raising venture capital, chances are we can help make fundraising less painful
